language.sampleSubtext: {{name}} — translation sample, some strings may appear in English

privacy.telemetryDescription: Off by default. When on, the app records anonymous feature-usage counts only — never document content, file paths, or personal information. In this version nothing leaves your computer (counts stay in a local buffer you can inspect below).

updates.placeholderNote: Updates check GitHub releases. The release channel is a placeholder until the project is published — updates will not download until it is configured.

files.associationStatusNote: Status is set in Windows Settings → Default apps. We don't read it from here.
files.redirectedToOsDefaults: Opened Windows Settings → Default apps. Choose PDF_Viewer_Editor there to confirm.
files.notImplementedDefault: Runtime default-app changes aren't supported on this OS. Set the default manually in your OS settings.

about.blurb: PDF_Viewer_Editor is built on Electron, React, pdf.js, and pdf-lib — all permissively licensed.
